r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Antacids are the only solution for acid and digestion problems
relatability_triggers: Recently, alternative medicine expert Dr. Bryce Wylde, a frequent guest on the Dr Oz show, revealed a simple secret that amazed millions who suffer with digestion nightmares.

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: : Your stomach naturally produces acid so strong, it can dissolve an aluminum spoon in just 30 minutes! And when excess acid escapes into your esophagus, throat and stomach lining, it unleashes the scorching pain of Acid-Reflux, heartburn, ulcers and more misery. Digestion Defender #1: Balances Stomach Acid. Your first line of defense is calcium malate. This natural acid buffer instantly sends stomach acid levels plunging. And holds acid levels down so they don't return! Digestion Defender #2: Instant, Soothing Relief. Aloe Cure is brimming with polysaccharides, a 'wonder' compound that gently coats the throat, esophagus and stomach, carrying instant relief to cells scorched by excess acid.
mechanism_proof_points: Dr. Bryce Wylde - Dr Oz show guest, best selling author
Dr. Liza Leal - Chief Medical Officer at Meridian Medical
Francisco De Weever - Certified Nutritional Microscopist
unique_differentiators: Two-part defense system (calcium malate + polysaccharides) from pure aloe vera

lead.hook_sentence: Recently, alternative medicine expert Dr. Bryce Wylde, a frequent guest on the Dr Oz show, revealed a simple secret that amazed millions who suffer with digestion nightmares.
lead.full_text: Recently, alternative medicine expert Dr. Bryce Wylde, a frequent guest on the Dr Oz show, revealed a simple secret that amazed millions who suffer with digestion nightmares. And people haven't stopped talking about it since. "I'd give anything to make it stop!" That's what most people will tell you when asked about their digestive problems. "It's just horrible" says Ralph Burns, a former digestion victim. "I was tortured for years by my Acid Reflux. Sometimes I'd almost pass out from the pain. My wife suffers with digestion problems too. If she eats one wrong thing, she spends hours stuck in the bathroom dealing with severe bouts of constipation or diarrhea."
lead.transition_to_body: FDA warning about antacids creates fear, then solution

proof_elements.verbatim_text: "My patients report their IBS, Crohn's, Colitis, Constipation, Acid Reflux and a host of other digestive problems have all but disappeared."

proof_elements.claim_supported: Works after 40 years of suffering when nothing else did
proof_elements.verbatim_text: "For the better part of my life I purposely avoided a lot of foods... I'd experience a burning sensation through my esophagus like somebody poured hot lead or battery acid down my throat... Doctors put me on all sorts of antacid remedies. But nothing worked. Or if they did, it would only be for a brief period... I decided to experiment. I stopped taking the PPIs altogether and replaced it with a daily diet of Aloe Cure. Then something remarkable happened - NOTHING! Not even the slightest hint of indigestion... for the first time in 40 years I didn't need pills or tablets to avoid indigestion."

gaps_identified: Multiple doctors but no specific credentials verified
Dr. Bryce Wylde connection to Dr. Oz is borrowed authority

story_architecture.story_text: For the better part of my life I purposely avoided a lot of foods. Especially ones with even a tiny bit of seasoning. Because if I didn't, I'd experience a burning sensation through my esophagus - like somebody poured hot lead or battery acid down my throat. Add to that those disgusting 'mini throw ups' and I was in 'indigestion hell'. Doctors put me on all sorts of antacid remedies. But nothing worked. Or if they did, it would only be for a brief period. And then boom! My nightmare would return. Then one day at dinner, a friend of mine said, 'Why don't you try an aloe drink?' I said, 'Aloe drink? Jeez. That doesn't sound good at all!' The next day he brought me a case of something called Aloe Cure. I was shocked! Aloe Cure tasted pretty good too. It has a pleasant grape flavor that I actually enjoy drinking. I decided to experiment. I stopped taking the PPIs altogether and replaced it with a daily diet of Aloe Cure. Then something remarkable happened - NOTHING! Not even the slightest hint of indigestion. And here's the best part. The next day we had Italian food - my worst enemy. But for the first time in 40 years I didn't need pills or tablets to avoid indigestion.
story_beats: Burning pain like 'hot lead or battery acid'
Doctors put on antacids - nothing worked
Tried Aloe Cure - remarkably, nothing happened (no symptoms)
Ate worst enemy (Italian food) - first time in 40 years without pills
story_architecture.emotional_arc: decades of suffering → skepticism → surprise → liberation → joy
story_architecture.lesson_or_moral: After 40 years of failed treatments, the simple natural solution finally worked

transitions: Lead → FDA Warning: 'FDA Warns About Popular Antacids'

metadata.source_file: Talk Show Doctor Reveals Digestion Remedy That Works Instantly 2013-2015 (2 Stars).md
metadata.extraction_notes: Newspaper advertorial format with fake news layout. Dr. Oz show guest endorsement. FDA warning countersell against antacids. Aloe Cure product (same brand as other Arsenal pieces). Strong FSSIT in testimonial.

fssit_candidates.statement: Doctors put me on all sorts of antacid remedies. But nothing worked. Or if they did, it would only be for a brief period. And then boom! My nightmare would return.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Powerfully validates decades of failed doctor-prescribed solutions

fssit_candidates.statement: I'd give anything to make it stop!
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Crystallizes the desperation state of target audience

fssit_candidates.statement: For the better part of my life I purposely avoided a lot of foods
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Validates the sacrifice and lifestyle limitation

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: Concentrated in extended testimonial section with powerful emotional resonance

temporal_analysis.cultural_moment_reference: Dr. Oz era peak influence, PPI controversy

objection_handling: Simple to use (2 ounces twice daily)

extraction_quality.notes: Strong FSSIT density in testimonial. FDA warning creates effective fear countersell. Extended Ralph Burns testimonial is the emotional anchor. Newspaper advertorial format with fake news layout. Same Aloe Cure brand as other Arsenal pieces (drug company fear, confessions). Celebrity doctor borrowed authority from Dr. Oz ecosystem.
